nasb.text: Therefore having overlooked the times of ignorance, God is now declaring to men that all people everywhere should repent,

esv.text: The times of ignorance God overlooked, but now he commands all people everywhere to repent,

cnv.text: 過去那無知的時代，　神不加以追究；現在，他卻吩咐各處的人都要悔改，

ccb.text: “上帝以往不鉴察世人的无知，现在则命令世上所有的人都要悔改。

csbs.text: “虽然神并不鉴察那愚昧无知的时代，但如今却吩咐各处所有的人都要悔改，
